scenario: Verify Automated Scoring and Evaluation of Supplier Responses
description: Create a sourcing event with multiple suppliers and verify that Coupa's automated scoring and evaluation accurately ranks the suppliers.

scenario: Conflict Between Automated Scoring and Manual Evaluation
description: Create a sourcing event with conflicting automated scoring and manual evaluation and verify that Coupa handles the conflict correctly.

scenario: Resend Sourcing Event to Production
description: Create a sourcing event and verify that Coupa allows the sourcing event to be resent to production.
